data.title: OpenText Enterprise Data and AI Solutions to be Available on AWS European Sovereign Cloud
data.description: OpenText is introducing a new hybrid sovereign cloud architecture tailored for regulated European Union entities, in addition to the existing offerings in North America. This secure platform, compatible with AI technology, will provide enhanced data capabilities to customers. The announcement was made on April 13, 2026, by OpenText™ (NASDAQ/TSX: OTEX) based in WATERLOO, ON.

data.title: OpenText and S3NS Partner to Deliver European Sovereign Cloud Solutions with Google Cloud
data.description: A major collaboration has been unveiled on April 13, 2026, between OpenText™, a renowned enterprise AI data management leader (NASDAQ/TSX: OTEX), and S3NS to bolster the European Trusted Cloud with a hybrid architecture. This partnership aims to facilitate secure AI operations at scale. The development signifies a significant move in enhancing data management solutions; a critical aspect in today's tech-driven world.

data.title: FPT and Quadient Reinforce Long-Standing Strategic Partnership to Bolster Digital Transformation and Co-Innovation
data.description: In Paris, a recent development involves FPT, a global IT services provider, entering a new five-year Master Services Agreement with Quadient, a French-based technology and automation company. This agreement aims to extend the Offshore Development Center model and strengthen collaborations in AI-driven innovation. The partnership signifies a significant milestone in their nearly two-decade relationship and outlines a detailed plan for future growth and value generation. Quadient has been a key partner for FPT in their shared journey.
TotalEnergies reports new find with roughly 100 million barrels of recoverable resources
European index futures slide, with EuroStoxx 50 down 1.51%, DAX down 1.58% and FTSE down 0.56%
Indonesia says talks are underway with the US on permitting military overflights through its airspace

data.title: Goldman Sachs, Fastenal And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are down this morning, with focus on Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS) expected to report earnings of $16.41 per share on revenue of $16.93 billion. Goldman Sachs shares closed at $907.80 on Friday, rising by 0.5%. Another focus is on Children's Place Inc. (NASDAQ: PLCE), which reported fourth-quarter losses of $1.86 per share, below analyst expectations. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
TotalEnergies says it has made a new discovery in the Moho licence in the Republic of the Congo

data.title: Institutions fueling crypto surge, with retail sidelined; YouTuber says most struggle to pay bills, impacting participation.
data.description: According to crypto YouTuber Michaël van de Poppe, the majority of individuals face challenges in meeting their monthly financial obligations. This is one of the reasons why the retail sector may not be as active in this cycle.

data.title: Musician's $420K Bitcoin 'retirement fund' vanished via fake Ledger app. 5.9 Bitcoin already sent to KuCoin addresses.
data.description: ZachXBT, a blockchain investigator, revealed that Garrett Dutton's Bitcoin holding of 5.9 has been successfully transferred to deposit addresses linked to KuCoin.
